item.title: RISE with SAP
item.summary: News value Update timeline; public information only.

updates.event: In Q2 2026 customers including ACCIONA, AIRBUS, Electrolux, Eli Lilly, Gilead Sciences, Shell, Samsonite Group, Sun Pharma and Vonovia continued to choose the RISE with SAP journey.

evidence.source_quote: In the second quarter, customers around the globe continued to choose the "RISE with SAP" journey. These customers included: ACCIONA, AIRBUS, City of Osnabrueck, Electrolux, Eli Lilly, Gilead Sciences, HARTING, Hindustan Zinc, The Humboldt University of Berlin, JET, Ørsted, Samsonite Group, Shell, The Shoprite Group, SIGNAL IDUNA, SPAR (CH), Sun Pharma, Vonovia.

facts.statement: In Q2 2026 customers including ACCIONA, AIRBUS, Electrolux, Eli Lilly, Gilead Sciences, Shell, Samsonite Group, Sun Pharma and Vonovia continued to choose the RISE with SAP journey.

item.html:
In Q2 2026 customers including ACCIONA, AIRBUS, Electrolux, Eli Lilly, Gilead Sciences, Shell, Samsonite Group, Sun Pharma and Vonovia continued to choose the RISE with SAP journey.
